name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Task/Job - Windows
notes:
This building block detects uncommon scheduled task.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: pH-T
SIGMA Title: Uncommon Scheduled Task Once 00:00
SIGMA Description: Detects scheduled task creation events that include suspicious actions, and is run once at 00:00


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Task/Job - Windows on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of schtasks.exe

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '*/create* *regsvr32.exe*') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%wscript%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vbscript%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cscript%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%wmic %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%wmic.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%regsvr32.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%powershell%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/create%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Task/Job - Windows on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of schtasks.exe

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '*/create* *regsvr32.exe*') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%wscript%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vbscript%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cscript%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%wmic %' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%wmic.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%regsvr32.exe%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%powershell%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\%') or (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/create%') AQL filter query
